texto: Of course, I'd like to have fake legs. I would dance with a boy and then afterwards pull up my dress to show him my fake legs, just to watch him fall over from the shock of it. I'd do that with a hundred boys until I found the one who got down on his knees and kissed my fake legs. That's how I would know I found the right person
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Victor Ladato: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a humor. O trecho “Of course, I'd like to have fake legs. I would dance with a boy and then afterwards pull up my dr…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que humor, cute, funny pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de funny e mathilda-savitch.
